headline: Target Dress Code Shift And Circle Deal Days Draw Investor Attention
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) is rolling out a new dress code that standardizes in-store employees in plain red shirts with blue jeans or khakis. The company-wide change is aimed at creating a more consistent and recognizable in-store experience for shoppers. Target is also gearing up for its Target Circle Deal Days event, scheduled for March 25-27, with exclusive offers for loyalty members. For readers watching big box retail, Target sits in a highly competitive space that spans essentials, apparel,...

headline: Walmart digital price labels are coming to every store shelf in U.S. by end of 2026
summary: Walmart is rolling out digital shelf labels and expects it to be in all U.S. stores by year’s end. Is it surge pricing in disguise or just new tech efficiency?

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats As Of March 20, 2026
summary: Dividend Aristocrats (NOBL) beat SPY YTD; March pullback offers entry. Recent dividend increases were from CL, GD, LIN, and O. See more here.

headline: Target deals fall flat as consumers shop elsewhere
summary: Target might truly be one of the saddest retail stories in recent history. Granted, the company is still alive and well — or at least alive. It hasn't succumbed to bankruptcy like so many other retailers in recent years. But the company isn't exactly thriving. Even though Target's most recent ...
